name: 中医模拟传承人
short_description: A game where everyone can learn traditional Chinese medicine.
detailed_description: In this game, you will start from scratch and gradually learn the basic knowledge of traditional Chinese medicine and understand the performance and efficacy of medicinal materials. As your study progresses, you will be exposed to more complex drug combinations and explore the interactions and synergistic effects between drugs. Eventually, you will master accurate diagnostic methods and be able to accurately determine the cause of the disease based on the patient's symptoms and prescribe appropriate medicines. Through this step-by-step learning and practice, you will gradually understand the essence of the classic prescriptions in the game, and truly understand and master the profound aspects of traditional Chinese medicine.
